channel.title: Battiti
channel.description: Magazine musicale dedicato alle musiche avventurose della contemporaneità, dal jazz all'elettronica sperimentale, dalla black music al rock d'avanguardia, con particolare attenzione alle novità discografiche e alle scene sotterranee italiane e internazionali. Un'ora e mezza di musica che ogni notte, per tutta la settimana, si compone di ascolti differenti: nuove uscite, interviste, concerti e live report, speciali, monografie e interventi realizzati con materiali diversi e ospiti esterni, che trovano nell'alternanza delle proposte, delle voci e dei formati la specificità e il senso della ricerca radiofonica. Un programma a cura di Ghighi Di Paola e Antonia Tessitore con Chiara Colli, Simone Sottili e Nina Terruzzi.
channel.itunes:author: RaiPlaySound

item.title: Vibrisse #36
item.description: MIKE PATTON, Il cielo in una stanza, da "Mondo Cane" – Ipecac Recordings // JOHN ZORN PLAYS THE MUSIC OF ENNIO MORRICONE, Giù la testa (Duck, You Sucker!), da "The Big Gundown" – Elektra Nonesuch // MARC RIBOT Y LOS CUBANOS POSTIZOS, Postizo, da "The Prosthetic Cubans" – Atlantic // GROUND-ZERO, Folhas Secas, da "Plays Standards" – ReR Megacorp // GUANO PADANO, Guano Padano, da "Guano Padano" – Tremoloa Records // THE MELODY FOUR, Besame Mucho, da "On Request" – Chabada // 4WALLS, Ces Gens-là, da "Which Side Are You On" – Red Note // VAKKI PLAKKULA, La Notte Pullula, da "Babirussa Capibara" – Le Arti Malandrine // YANNIS KYRIAKIDES / ANDY MOOR, A School Burnt Down, da "Rebetika" – Unsounds // LAND OF KUSH, Mobil Nil, da "The Big Mango" – Constellation // ROOTS MAGIC, Cloak And Dagger – singolo digitale // KOFI FLEXXX, Apothecary (feat. Billy Woods), da "Flowers In The Dark" – Native Rebel Recordings // WORLD SAXOPHONE QUARTET, Bluocracy Part 1, da "Political Blues" – Justin Time // DANIEL MARCELLUS GIVENS, You Know It, da "Egress" – Aesthetics // IRREVERSIBLE ENTANGLEMENTS, Lágrimas Del Mar, da "Open The Gates" – International Anthem Recording Company // YO LA TENGO, Nuclear War (Version 2), da "Nuclear War" – Matador // LESTER BOWIE, The Great Pretender, da "The Great Pretender" – ECM Records

item.title: Heavy Combination
item.description: SISTER NANCY, Transport Connection, da "600% Dynamite!" – Soul Jazz Records // LIL' ED AND THE BLUES IMPERIALS, Cold Side Of The Bed, da "Slideways" – Alligator Records // PRAED, Al Maraya, da "Al Wahem" – Ruptured // DAVID SHEA, Sitting In A Painted Cave, da "Meditations" – Room 40 // TUNJI OYELANA & THE BENDERS, To Whom It May Concern, da "Tunji Oyelana" – Soundway Records // TUNJI OYELANA & THE BENDERS, Ipasan, da "Tunji Oyelana" – Soundway Records // MURIKI, Passeur, da "Hope" – Funkeria Records // JOSEPH KAMARU, Kenya Kũrũngara, da "Joseph Kamaru, Heavy Combination 1966-2007" – Disciples // JOSEPH KAMARU & KAMARU SUPER STARS, Karolina, da "Joseph Kamaru, Heavy Combination 1966-2007" – Disciples // SANGAZUZA, Sono sa kua de téma, da "AA.VV., Léve Léve Vol.2 (Sao Tomé & Principe sounds 70s - 80s)" – Les Disques Bongo Joe // BULAWÊ N'GULI FALA / QUINTA DAS PALMEIRAS, Tira a mão da minha xuxa, da "AA.VV., Lévé Léve Vol.2 (Sao Tomé & Principe sounds 70s - 80s)" – Les Disques Bongo Joe // SATAN IS MY BROTHER, Roma e Genova, 6 e 8 marzo 2026 // SATAN IS MY BROTHER, Dive, da "Close Your Eyes, See Black" - Dissipatio // SATAN IS MY BROTHER, Deep, da "Close Your Eyes, See Black" - Dissipatio // MASSIMO PUPILLO, BARBARA HANNIGAN, DAVID CHALMIN, Lalala, da "La donna del Lago" - Die Schachtel // MASSIMO PUPILLO, BARBARA HANNIGAN, DAVID CHALMIN, Mezza di voce, da "La donna del Lago" - Die Schachtel

item.title: Sandwich Gelato
item.description: THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, Raisa, da "Live In Portland" - Sowie Sound // THE AVANT-GARDE FLAMENCO TRIO, Que Pena, da "Lunar" – Redshift Music // PHEW & DANIELLE DE PICCIOTTO, Im Nebel, da "Paper Masks" – Mute Records // NYTT LAND, Mansi, da "Aba Khan" - Prophecy Productions // A NICE NOISE, Avellino, 7 marzo - 21 maggio 2026 // ANIKA, tour italiano, 7-9 marzo 2026 // SAN VITO JAZZ, 7-28 marzo 2026 // BEAUTIFY JUNKYARDS, Dancer's Reward, da "Nova" - Ghost Box // JIM JARMUSCH AND ANIKA, The Lake 1, da "Father Mother Sister Brother (Original Music From The Film)" - Sacred Bones Records // JAMES BRANDON LEWIS TRIO, Apple Cores #1, da "Apple Cores" - Anti- // SCHNTZL, Hard Fantasy, da "Fata Morgana" – Viernulvier Records // SCHNTZL, Jardin Secret, da "Fata Morgana" – Viernulvier Records // SCHNTZL, The Pearl, da "Fata Morgana" – Viernulvier Records // BOSQUE VACIO, Säk Buj, da "Aves De Nahá" - Dinzu Artefacts // BOSQUE VACÍO, Säk Ch'ich', da "Aves De Nahá" - Dinzu Artefacts // BOSQUE VACÍO, Kok ta', da "Aves De Nahá" - Dinzu Artefacts // NABELÓSE, Hinter Meinen Dünen, da "Haar" - Trost Rcords // NABELÓSE, Niriides, da "Haar" - Trost Records // RYAN J RAFFA/SAM PREKOP, Chamber Music, da "Only Came To Say Goodbye" - Crash Symbols // RYAN J RAFFA/SAM PREKOP, Why Return, da "Only Came To Say Goodbye" - Crash Symbols

item.title: Patterns From Nature
item.description: TENOR SAW, Golden Hen, da "600% Dynamite!" – Soul Jazz Records // PRAED, Assarab, da "Al Wahem" – Ruptured // THE AVANT-GARDE FLAMENCO TRIO, Corazones, da "Lunar" – Redshift Music // PHEW & DANIELLE DE PICCIOTTO, Pixelwissen, da "Paper Masks" – Mute Records // THE TOMEKA REID QUARTET, Oo Long!, da "Dance! Skip! Hop!" – Out Of Your Head Records // QUINSIN NACHOFF, Patterns From Nature I. Branches, da "Patterns From Nature" – Whirlwind Recordings // EIC (EDEN INVERTED COLLECTIVE) FEAT. ZOE PIA, Africa, da "Atlantidei" – Caligola // BRANDON SEABROOK, Name Dropping Is The Lowest Form Of Conversation, da "Hellbent Daydream" – Pyroclastic Records // BRANDON SEABROOK, The Arkansas Tattler, da "Hellbent Daydream" – Pyroclastic Records // BLUE EARTH SOUND, Cicero Nights, da "Cicero Nights" - Deep Matter Records // BLUE EARTH SOUND, Gia's Point, da "Cicero Night" - Deep Matter Records // SHOLTO, Purple Flow, da "The Sirens" - Deep Matter Records // SHOLTO, Persephone's Perception, da "The Sirens" - Deep Matter Records // THE OFFLINE, Aurore, "La Grande Évasion" - Deep Matter Records // THE OFFLINE, Les Aventuriers, "La Grande Évasion" - Deep Matter Records

item.title: A Circle And A Star
item.description: LIL' ED AND THE BLUES IMPERIALS, Bad All By Myself, da "Slideways" – Alligator Records // THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, Sparkley Con, da "Live In Portland" - Sowie Sound // NYTT LAND, Taiga, da "Aba Khan" - Prophecy Productions // DAVID SHEA, The Heart Sutra, da "Meditations" – Room 40 // MICA P. HINSON, The Last Train To Texas, da "The Tomorrow Man" - Ponderosa Music Records // NATE MERCEREAU, From One Place To Another, da "excellent Treaveler" - Third Man Records // RAÚL CANTIZANO, Fragmento Ausente, da "Aunque Llegue La Mañana" - Noray Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÈME SOEUR, A Circle And A Star, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÈME SOEUR, The Fallen By Watch Bird, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JANE WEAVER SEPTIÉME SŒUR WITH DEMDIKE STARE, Europium Alluminate, da "The Fallen By Watch Bird (Expanded Edition)" - Fire Records // JEAN-MARIE MERCIMEK, Le Camion, da "Dans Le Camion De Marguerite Duras" - Aguirre Records // JEAN-MARIE MERCIMEK, Une Bouche Regardée, da "Dans Le Camion De Marguerite Duras" - Aguirre Records // JULINKO, Cloudmachine, da "Naebula" - Maple Death Records // JULINKO, Kiss the Lion's Tongue, da "Naebula" - Maple Death Records // NEOPRIMITIVI, L'estasi dello spirito, da "Il sangue è pronto" - 42 Records // NEOPRIMITIVI, L'estasi del corpo, da "Il sangue è pronto" - 42 Records

item.title: BATTITI DAL VIVO Centro d’Arte 2025: Mary Halvorson Amaryllis Sextet
item.description: CRYS COLE & OREN AMBARCHI, Davide Campari, da "Gallivant" – The Black Dot // MARY HALVORSON AMARYLLIS SEXTET // Registrato alla Sala dei Giganti al Liviano, Padova, il 25 ottobre 2025
item.itunes:title: BATTITI DAL VIVO Centro d’Arte 2025: Mary Halvorson Amaryllis Sextet

item.title: Alessandra Novaga live & intervista
item.description: ALESSANDRA NOVAGA, I Should Have Been A Gardner, da "I Should Have Been A Gardner" - Die Schachtel // ALESSANDRA NOVAGA LIVE & INTERVISTA // ALESSANDRA NOVAGA, Erbarme dich // ALESSANDRA NOVAGA, The Artistic Image Is Always A Miracle // MANUEL ZURRIA, Lachrimae Antiquae, da "Landscape With Tears" - Die Schachtel // PAULINE OLIVEROS/ STUART DEMPSTER/ PANAIOTIS, Lear, da "Deep Listening" - New Albion // ALESSANDRA NOVAGA & KID MILLIONS, Sinopia #3, da "Sinopia" - Long Song Records // BACH / BRENDEL, Chorale Prelude "Nun Komm' Der Heiden Heiland" BWV 659 (arr. Busoni), da "Back plays Brendel" - Philips Classics // ALESSANDRA NOVAGA & ALESSANDRO BOSETTI, Amore amore amore - inedito // STEFANO PILIA, Eve - for string orchestra, da "Lacinia" – Die Schachtel // LOREN CONNORS, Airs 3, da "Airs" - Recital Recital Ten // WHAT WE DO WHEN IN SILENCE, Sessione 8a, da "What We Do When In Silence" - Holidays Records
item.itunes:title: Alessandra Novaga live & intervista

item.title: Vibrisse #35
item.description: SON BAYOU, Flor campestre – 7" Names You Can Trust // GARY CLAIL & ON-U SOUND SYSTEM, Toes Tapping, da "End Of The Century Party" – On-U Sound // BRION GYSIN, Kick (Discomix) feat. Don Cherry, da "Ramuntcho Matta Presents Brion Gysin / Polo Lombardo" – Mosquito // AL-QASAR, Ssir w Ztam (Get Busy) ft. Sami Galbi, da "Uncovered" – Wewantsounds // ABU OBAIDA HASSAN & HIS TAMBOUR, Qamar Al Massa (Moon Of The Night), da "The Shaigiya Sound Of Sudan" – Ostinato Records // LIRAZ, Zan Bezan / Lalei – Lalabye, da "Zan" – Glitterbeat // CELSO PIÑA, Cumbia Sobre El Río feat. Blanquito Man & Control Machete, da "Barrio Bravo" - MCM // MORESOUNDS, Lost In OAK, da "Roll G In Dub" – Original Cultures // GLASS BEAMS, Snake Oil, da "Mahal" – Ninja Tune // JASDEEP SINGH DEGUN, Enigma 7.5, da "Anomaly" - Real World Records // HENRY ROLLINS, Invisible Woman Blues, da "Black Coffee Blues" – 2.13.61 Records // BERNIE WORRELL, Set The Tone / Victory, da "Pieces Of Woo: The Other Side" – CMP Records // OMAR KHORSHID, Guitar El Chark (Guitar Of The Orient), da "Guitar El Chark" - Sublime Frequencies // MANDOLIN SISTERS, Venkatachalanilayam, da "Odysseys in Electric Carnatic" – Discostan // PUBLIC IMAGE LTD., Socialist, da "Metal Box" – Virgin // NICO, Chelsea Girl, da "Chelsea Girl" – Verve Records

item.title: Banque de son
item.description: JONI VOID, Droner, da "Blaz" – Banque De Son // JONI VOID, Heather, da "Blaz" – Banque De Son // HUGO BLOUIN, Soupe pragmatique, da "Le Buffet" – Ambiances Magnétiques // HUGO BLOUIN, Du jazz sérieux, da "Le Buffet" – Ambiances Magnétiques // GÉRALDINE CÉLÉRIER EGUILUZ / MICHEL F. CÔTÉ, La montaña y el agua, da "hORs TempS" – Ambiances Magnétiques // KRIS DAVIS / THE LUTOSŁAWSKI QUARTET, The Known End, da "The Solastalgia Suite" – Pyroclastic Records // URSDEMOULD, Tamago, da "HitoriWithMaya" – autoproduzione // MAGDA DROZD, Divided By Dusk, da "Divided By Dusk" - Präsens Editionen // MAGDA DROZD, Rounds ft. Rai Tateishi, da "Divided by Dusk" - Präsens Editionen // ARCIBANDA, Fiaba, da "New Item" - Artetetra // ARCIBANDA, Berbuah, da "New Item" - Artetetra // YASMINE HAMDAN, I Remember I Forget, da "I Remember I Forget" - Crammed Discs // AÏTA MON AMOUR, Dami, da "Abda" - Shouka // ETAF, Own Me, da "Don't Call Me Baby" - Autoproduzione // MOUST ROUSNAM/ALLA, Alla, da "Aswat Jamila" - Autoproduzione // HADY MOAMER, Hayat Oud, da "Marsam" - Autoproduzione // SAINT LEVANT/47SOUL/SHADI ALBORINI/QASEM AL NAJJAR, Daloona, da "Love Letters" - Autoproduzione // ZEYNE, Hilwa, da "Awda" - Scarab Records // WEGZ, Dawama, da "Aqareb (Sid B)" - Raad Records // FARAJ SULEIMAN, Remnant Of Soul, da "Maryam" - Autoproduzione // KAZDOURA, Mili, da "Ghoyoum - August 4 Records

item.itunes:summary: JONI VOID, Droner, da "Blaz" – Banque De Son // JONI VOID, Heather, da "Blaz" – Banque De Son // HUGO BLOUIN, Soupe pragmatique, da "Le Buffet" – Ambiances Magnétiques // HUGO BLOUIN, Du jazz sérieux, da "Le Buffet" – Ambiances Magnétiques // GÉRALDINE CÉLÉRIER EGUILUZ / MICHEL F. Rai Tateishi, da "Divided by Dusk" - Präsens Editionen // ARCIBANDA, Fiaba, da "New Item" - Artetetra // ARCIBANDA, Berbuah, da "New Item" - Artetetra // YASMINE HAMDAN, I Remember I Forget, da "I Remember I Forget" - Crammed Discs // AÏTA MON AMOUR, Dami, da "Abda" - Shouka // ETAF, Own Me, da "Don't Call Me Baby" - Autoproduzione // MOUST ROUSNAM/ALLA, Alla, da "Aswat Jamila" - Autoproduzione // HADY MOAMER, Hayat Oud, da "Marsam" - Autoproduzione // SAINT LEVANT/47SOUL/SHADI ALBORINI/QASEM AL NAJJAR, Daloona, da "Love Letters" - Autoproduzione // ZEYNE, Hilwa, da "Awda" - Scarab Records // WEGZ, Dawama, da "Aqareb (Sid B)" - Raad Records // FARAJ SULEIMAN, Remnant Of Soul, da "Maryam" - Autoproduzione // KAZDOURA, Mili, da "Ghoyoum - August 4 Records

item.title: A Century of Sounds and Memory
item.description: LAMISI, Tumsum, da "Let Us Clap" – Real World // LAMISI, Come, da "Let Us Clap" – Real World // ALBERT NADEAU, I Am Black – 7" Analog Africa // EGOLESS AFRO DUB SYSTEM, Adowa, da "All That Was" – Autoproduzione Egoless // EGOLESS AFRO DUB SYSTEM, Afrowise (Original Mix), da "All That Was" – Autoproduzione Egoless // ANA HABESH, Drawn To The Circle (Vanuatu), da "A Century Of Sounds" – Cities And Memory // NDINIBEATZ, Mwana wevhu (Cameroon), da "A Century Of Sounds" – Cities And Memory // SONIC-SOMA, Kinnaur Calling (India), da "A Century Of Sounds" – Cities And Memory // RANIL Y SU CONJUNTO TROPICAL, Bahia, da "Galaxia Tropical" - Analog Africa // RANIL Y SU CONJUNTO TROPICAL, Lindo Atardecer, da "Galaxia Tropical" - Analog Africa // ŠIROM, tour italiano, 26 febbraio - 1 marzo 2026 // DAN KINZELMAN "UNFALL", Perugia, 28 febbraio 2026 // MERIDIANI PARALLELI, Milano, 1 marzo/19 aprile/17 maggio 2026 // ŠIROM, Between The Fingers The Drops Of Tomorrow's Dawn, da "In the Wind of Night, Hard-Fallen Incantations Whisper" - Glitterbeat // YOUMNA SABA, Ahad, da "Wishah" - Touch T33.22, Ruptured // WOODY SHAW, Sunbath, da "Love Dance" – Time Traveler Recordings MUSE // JOE CHAMBERS, The Orge, da "Double Exposure" – Time Traveler Recordings MUSE // LONGINEU PARSONS, Spaced, da "Longineu Parsons" – Luv N' Haight // CHARLES TYLER/ENSEMBLE, Just For Two, da "Voyage From Jericho" – Frederiksberg Records // DUKE ELLINGTON, Medley: Black and Tan Fantasy, The Mooche & Creole Love Call, da "Copenhagen 1964" – Storyville Records

item.title: Truck Rurâl
item.description: FILHOS, Avô III, da "Vol. 2" - Sucata Tapes // FILHOS, Avó II, da "Vol. 2" - Sucata Tapes // CAVEIRAS, Santo selvagem ft. Serena Altavilla, da "Guerra Total Na Boca Do Lixo" - UR Suoni // CAVEIRAS, Campo de guerra, da "Guerra Total Na Boca Do Lixo" - UR Suoni // JOE HARVEY-WHYTE/GEIR SUNDSTØL, Ribbles, da "Langeleik" – Hubro // JOE HARVEY-WHYTE/GEIR SUNDSTØL, Rørvikelva, da "Langeleik" – Hubro // JOE HARVEY-WHYTE/GEIR SUNDSTØL, Tana, da "Langeleik" – Hubro // HÅVARD SKASET / STÅLE LIAVIK SOLBERG, Ottestad Orbits, da "Truck Rurâl" - ConradSound // HÅVARD SKASET / STÅLE LIAVIK SOLBERG, Lonesome Løten, da "Truck Rurâl" - ConradSound // ESSENDON AIRPORT, Three + Six, da "Mor" - Chapter Music // ESSENDON AIRPORT, Malibu, da "Mor" - Chapter Music // ESSENDON AIRPORT, Wallpaper Music, da "Mor" - Chapter Music // SWELL MAPS, International Rescue, da "The John Peel Sessions" - Mute // SWELL MAPS, Helicopter Spies / A Raincoat's Room, da "The John Peel Sessions" - Mute // THIS HEAT, Horizontal Hold, da "Made Available (John Peel Sessions)" - THESE // MOVIETONE, Stone, da "Peel Sessions 1994-1997" - Textile Records // MOVIETONE, Mono Valley, da "Peel Sessions 1994-1997" - Textile Records // BROADCAST, Colour Me In, da "Maida Vale Sessions" - Warp Records

item.title: Always Ready To Drop It
item.description: MILAN W, I Wait, da "Leave Another Day" – Stroom // MAURO ORSELLI, Ideazione Musicale per 'Archi Percussioni e Voce soprano', Teatro Il cantiere Gustavo Modena, Roma, 24 febbraio 2026 // STROOM SHOWCASE, Teatro Basilica, Roma, 25-26 febbraio 2026 // SUNIK KIM, Raum, Bologna, 26 febbraio 2026 // CIRO VITIELLO, Jellyfish Light, A Big Blue Lie, da "Notes From The Air" - Stroom // PARAJEKT, Mani e Pane, da "Parajekt" – Palazzo Recordings // PARAJEKT, Parajekt, da "Parajekt" – Palazzo Recordings // MORNING SEANCE, Breakfast in a Night Club, da "Eternal Life Makes Your Past Grow Too Big" – One Instrument // MORNING SEANCE, You're Mist To Us, da "Eternal Life Makes Your Past Grow Too Big" – One Instrument // MORNING SEANCE, Keep Your Spirits, da "Eternal Life Makes Your Past Grow Too Big" – One Instrument // NIGHTDALE FLOOR, Crystal Radio, da "Five Stagings" - Tombed Visions Records // NIGHTDALE FLOOR, Plum Dark, da "Five Stagings" - Tombed Visions Records // CINDYTALK, Invisible Adventure, da "Sunset And Forever" - The Helen Scarsdale Agency // CINDYTALK, Eien No Yuyake, da "Sunset And Forever" - The Helen Scarsdale Agency // MÚM, I'm 9 Today, da "Yesterday Was Dramatic - Today Is Ok" – Morr Music // LALI PUNA, Scary World Theory, da "Scary World Theory" – Morr Music // GUTHER, Boys Do Not Think, da "I Know You Know" - Morr Music // SEABEAR, Hospital Bed, da "The Ghost That Carried Us Away" - Morr Music // THE NOTWIST, Oh Sweet Fire (feat. Ben LaMar Gay), da "Vertigo Days" - Morr Music // TARWATER, USA feat. Lars Rudolph, da "Nuts Of Ay" - Morr Music // IGGY POP / TARWATER / ALVA NOTO, From Pent-Up Aching Rivers, da "Leaves Of Grass" – Morr Music

item.title: Vibrisse #34
item.description: GASPAR LAWAL, Kai Kai, da "Nigeria 70 (The Definitive Story of 1970's Funky Lagos)" - Strut // TONY ALLEN/ADRIAN YOUNGE, Ebun, da "Jazz Is Dead 11" - Jazz Is Dead // DAMU THE FUDGEMUNK/ARCHIE SHEPP/RAW POETIC, Tulips, da "Ocean Bridges - Redefinition Records // ERYKAH BADU, Dindt Cha Know, da "Mama's Gun" - Motown // BOB MARLEY & THE WAILERS, Sun Is Shining, da "Kaya" - Island Records // KOFFEE, Toast, da "Rupture" - Columbia // BOBBY OROZA, This Love, da "This Love" - Big Crown Records // GASTON DE LA CRUZ QUINTETO, Aldebarán, da "Constelaciones" - Discos // C'MON TIGRE, Mono No Aware 物の哀れ, da "Racines" - BDC // HOBBY HORSE, Impronte, da "Goodnight Moon" - Rous Records // ARTO LINDSAY, 4 Skies, da "Encyclopedia of Arto" - Northern Spy // CHE VUOI, Je N'aime Pas Trop, da "Cinecittàx" - Disques de la Spirale // ALICE, L'eau Sans Citron, da "Châteaux Faibles" - Les Disques Bongo Joe // PARRIS, Nasty, da "Vicious" - Parris Entertainment // M.I.A., Hussel, da "Kala" - XL Recordings // FEVER RAY, When I Grow Up, da "Fever Ray" - Rabid Records // KAP BAMBINO, New Breath, da "Zero Life Night Vision" // RIDDLORE, Cam Flu, da "Afromutations" - Nyege Nyege Tapes // TANA DELLE PIGRI, Danza Di Datteri, da "Wunderkammer" - Autoproduzione // FRANCESCA NAIBO, Com'è Veloce Il Tempo Adesso, da "So Much Time" - Ramble Records // ELLIOT SMITH, Needle In The Hay, da "Elliot Smith" - Kill Rock Stars

item.title: Memorie dal mare
item.description: YAMILA, Prado, da "Noor" - Umor Rex Records // YAMILA, Luces Robóticas, da "Noor" - Umor Rex Records // SHAWN LOVATO, Spling, da "Biotic" - Endectomorph // MO'ONG & BILAWA, Kliyengan, da "Mo'ong & Bilawa" - Bloxham Tapes // METAL PREYERS, Dr. Knob Jock, da "Retox Man" - Nyege Nyege Tapes // ÀLTERA MUSICA ISTANTANEA!, Fanfulla 5/a, Roma, 18 febbraio 2026 // THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, tour italiano, 21 – 24 febbraio 2026 // THE TIPTONS SAX QUARTET & DRUMS, December's Dance, da "Live In Portland" - Sowie Sound // SAAPATO, West Glacier Trail, da "In Alaska" - AKP Recordings // SAAPATO, 6AM Rainforest Drone, da "In Alaska" - AKP Recordings // PAOLO TORTORA, From a Memory Part 1, da "Waves of Fading Memories" - Torto Editions // RENATO FIORITO, Serranuda (stereo), da "Bastimento" - Superpang // RENATO FIORITO, Sei di nuovo qui, da "Bastimento" - Superpang // KOOSHIN, Nafta Aramida, da "Layla" – Little Axe Records
item.itunes:title: Memorie dal mare

item.title: Eterosfera
item.description: EMILY WITTBRODT, Now Rain, da "Wearing Words" - Futura Resistenza // EMILY WITTBRODT, The Angry Men, da "Wearing Words" - Futura Resistenza // NABOU, Eco III, da "Indigo" - Edition Records // NABOU, Parallelepipedum, da "Indigo" - Edition Records // KMRU, With Trees Where We Can See, da "Kin" - Editions Mego // PASSEPARTOUT DUO, From Tokyo, da "Pieces From Places" - Autoproduzione // JAMES ALLSOPP GROUP, Orugoru, da "Stars and Sand" - Vibe Collide Records // JAMES ALLSOPP GROUP, Gravity, da "Stars and Sand" - Vibe Collide Records // ORCHESTRA OF THE UPPER ATMOSPHERE, That's How I Feel, da "Theta Seven" - Discus Music // ORCHESTRA OF THE UPPER ATMOSPHERE, A Blessing In Azure, da "Theta Seven" - Discus Music // THE SLEEP OF REASON PRODUCES MONSTERS, Wth Lve, TSORPM, da "The Sleep Of Reason Produces Monsters" - Corbett vs. Dempsey // COURTNEY MARIE ANDREWS, Cons And Clowns, da "Valentine" – Loose Future Records // COURTNEY MARIE ANDREWS, Little Picture Of A Butterfly, da "Valentine" - Loose Future Records // LUCINDA WILLIAMS, Something's Gotta Give, da "World's Gone Wrong" – Highway 20 Records // LUCINDA WILLIAMS, Black Tears, da "World's Gone Wrong" – Highway 20 Records

item.title: Rudolstadt Festival: Dubioza Kolektiv
